expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Case focus is explicitly covered: blind shipment checkpoint covers prompt lifecycle, template flow, builder loading, and close or save decision safety
expectations.evidence: Baseline output names the risk themes but does not convert them into a concrete phase-5b gate with audit/delta artifacts.

expectations.text: [checkpoint_enforcement][blocking] Output aligns with primary phase phase5b
expectations.evidence: The output is explicitly framed as a shipment-checkpoint memo, so it is phase-5b aligned even though it misses the core gate.

uncertainties: Baseline run is a prompt-only blind assessment because the repo does not provide a local one-click no-skill executor.
workarounds: Used frozen fixture review as the no-skill baseline.
